scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @tankquest/shared && npm run dev --workspace @tankquest/web -- --mode tauri-development
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @tankquest/shared && npm run build --workspace @tankquest/web -- --mode tauri-development
scripts.build:web:preview: npm run build --workspace @tankquest/shared && npm run build --workspace @tankquest/web -- --mode tauri-preview
scripts.build:web:release: npm run build --workspace @tankquest/shared && npm run build --workspace @tankquest/web -- --mode tauri-release
